name: axonos-ag0001-chronos-boundary-flight
description: Local-only AxonOS browser game about cognitive sovereignty and typed intent.

scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const s=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8');const a=s.indexOf('<script>')+'<script>'.length;const b=s.lastIndexOf('</script>');if(a<8||b<a)throw new Error('script block missing');fs.writeFileSync('.inline-check.js',s.slice(a,b));" && node --check .inline-check.js && rm -f .inline-check.js
